Function reference

Interval Analysis

overlap()
Overlap Test

Allen’s Interval Algebra

allen_complement()
Complement of an Allen Relation
allen_composition()
Composition of Allen Relations
allen_converse()
Converse of an Allen Relation
allen_intersect()
Intersection of Allen Relations
allen_relation()
Allen Relation Between Definite Intervals
allen_union()
Union of Allen Relations

Aoristic Analysis

aoristic()

plot(<AoristicSum>,<missing>) plot(<RateOfChange>,<missing>)

roc()
Rate of Change

Stratigraphic Analysis

as_stratigraphy()

Graph Analysis

as_graph()
Graph

Getters and Setters

On this page

aion is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.
